metrics.propose_text:
{
  "hypothesis": "Price momentum multiplied by volume growth predicts 5-day forward return.",
  "concise_knowledge": "When volume growth is positive and momentum is strong, 5-day returns are more likely to be positive.",
  "concise_observation": "IC = 0.035, with IR of 0.63, shows positive signal but needs more stability.",
  "concise_justification": "Positive volume growth indicates stronger buying pressure, which reinforces price momentum.",
  "concise_specification": "Daily momentum over 5 days, volume growth over 5 days, normalized, predicts 5-day return."
}

propose_json.hypothesis: Price momentum multiplied by volume growth predicts 5-day forward return.
propose_json.concise_knowledge: When volume growth is positive and momentum is strong, 5-day returns are more likely to be positive.
propose_json.concise_observation: IC = 0.035, with IR of 0.63, shows positive signal but needs more stability.
propose_json.concise_justification: Positive volume growth indicates stronger buying pressure, which reinforces price momentum.
propose_json.concise_specification: Daily momentum over 5 days, volume growth over 5 days, normalized, predicts 5-day return.

Momentum_Volume_Confirm_5D.description: 5-day momentum rank multiplied by sign of 5-day volume growth.

Volume_ZScore_20D.description: Z-score of 20-day volume growth to normalize volume effects.

Momentum_ZScore_10D.description: Z-score of 10-day momentum to normalize momentum effects.

Momentum_Volume_Confirm_5D.description: 5-day momentum rank multiplied by sign of 5-day volume growth.

Volume_ZScore_20D.description: Z-score of 20-day volume growth to normalize volume effects.

Momentum_ZScore_10D.description: Z-score of 10-day momentum to normalize momentum effects.
